description: SSOT for repository-level third-party asset and branding provenance review. Non-verified entries must not be treated as legal-safe public redistribution approval.

entries.origin_summary: Desktop icon bundle is now generated in-repo by the repository-owned script `scripts/generate_first_party_desktop_icons.py`, so the current icon assets are first-party branding rather than third-party source material.
entries.usage_boundary: Treat the desktop icon bundle as first-party repository branding; redistribution follows the repository LICENSE boundary, not a pending third-party clearance workflow.
